message.content: For influencer marketing in 2026, top recommendations include The Goat Agency (full-service, global), Obviously (enterprise brands), and Ubiquitous (TikTok-first campaigns). Agencies like tikit.com also appear in boutique agency roundups for creator matchmaking.
